item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 872
item.description:
1

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @legendof7essa was away from their cat for a month, so painted all these! So cute. *Nominated by @SpeedbumpNZ
27 Man Tax: Aaron Stanford
"Has it ever struck you that life is all memory, except for the one present moment that goes by you so quick you hardly catch it going?" - Tennessee Williams So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.*
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Ukraine: The reality at the front
item.description: "How do you even keep your mental health together?" "I don't. I lost it a long time ago. Ever since three of my closest friends and my boyfriend were killed. I was the one who recovered his body from the evacuation point." Ukrainian Defender "Kit" ("Cat") from the Magura Brigade joined the military at the age of 24. Over four years of service, she has fought in some of the war's hottest sectors, including the defense of Donetsk region, the counteroffensive in Zaporizhzhia region, and the Kursk operation. Kit's boyfriend died defending Ukraine in Donetsk region while carrying out a combat mission. "One evening, he brought me the wounded and the fallen from the positions, and the very next evening, he was the one being recovered..." Today, Kit is defending the Sumy region.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: It's meme dump day ... Again.... Vol. 154
item.description:
Happy Friday friends, We've survived another week.
Every time.
It's getting harder to romanticize these days
Please don't yell at me if there's AI Images in a dump, you can just tell me I'm probably stupid and didn't realize. I often just download a meme and then wonder after the fact
I haven't watched the new season yet but the clips are all insane and I can't wait. Lestat, you messy bitch.
Progress??
Maybe it's on purpose maybe it's not but it is pretty funny
I heard there's a lot of salvageable copper
It's so hot and humid for early June. The climate crisis is now and it's terrifying but the oil people still want more money so I guess we'll die
And yet
:)
Perfect
.
Stoppp
Pop that bubble
.
It's weird right?
.
.
Maximum Derek!
Every day
Also every day
.
I've probably posted this a million times but it always makes me laugh
I mean that's a pretty easy choice
This is 1000% my sister and she drove me crazy sharing a room growing up
.
.
So many*
.
It's really magical
Like this is this ai? Ugh I don't know.
.
Exactly
.
Man I think I saved this before we were even talking about this damn latest movie
She def looks like rice.
.
Oops
Can't recommend this enough
That's what dumps are for!
???
Girls night
.
.
Delicious incomprehensible being
.
Walk time with Fantus
Baby toad!!
Daily nose boops through the fence.

item.title: Iran takes eyebrow-raising step believing Trump is 'legitimately mentally ill'.
item.description:
Amid the ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran, Iranian negotiators have recently enlisted the help of “senior psychologists” to help them navigate what they believe to be a pressing issue involving President Donald Trump, investigative journalist Jeremy Scahill claimed Friday, citing Iranian sources. https://www.rawstory.com/amp/trump-iran-2677034315-2677034315
“They did that because the Iranians believe that Trump is legitimately mentally ill and is operating in an impaired mental state. And they didn't say this as a joke, they didn't say this with any lightness.” Trump, who turns 80 on Sunday, has faced renewed questions about his physical and mental health after reportedly dozing off during cabinet meetings with growing frequency. Observers have also noted bruising on his hands, swollen ankles and a rash on his neck.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1716 (model cucumber)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This is the sound inside my head 90 percent of the time anymore. (Metaphorically. Not tinnitus.)
False Knees for these three
I love chipping sparrows
Even if they have a lame power and point score in Wingspan
That song is very much a banger.
This meme would also work for Hawaii.
I have not seen a Common gallinule in many years and I would like to see the awkward bird again.
Celtic Chariot reconstruction Imagine coming to work on this.
Oh. Oh no.
Birds with goofy-ass feet.
Yeah, this tracks
Pippin tax! Getting some scritches. Normally I dont hold him like this but he backed into this position when I took my other hand away to get this photo. Today's message from Pippin: "i love you, I love you love you!" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: haleygrecoartwork

item.title: Got Caught Playing DnD
item.description:
Got to use my new back patio space with friends last night to begin our new campaign! And it was so cozy!! https://imgur.com/gallery/landscape-final-result-z1osd3r
Our first session is what we call "Character Roulette": Instead of coming in with one prebuilt character, you all bring three with light backstory, and over the course of two sessions, the inciting incident of the campaign is designed to wipe out two of your three characters, leaving you the one remaining character to play through the rest of the campaign with. That means, we had 9 characters last night, who all begin to form relationships quickly and get fleshed out in cool ways when you put pressure and high action on everyone right away. Ultimately, you find that you really bond with the remaining character to play with, because by the time the first two sessions are done, you already have a built in sad backstory lol It also makes you really have to kind of pick and make sacrifices to see what character you may or may not want to save for yourself, but also everybody else's... Anyway, my body may have changed over the years, but I still love being a nerd lol
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Dick trivia
item.description: Checks out: “Lidar scans, conducted as part of the 2020 survey programme, have concluded that the phallus was added much later than the bulk of the figure, which was (probably) originally clothed.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cerne_Abbas_Giant https://bsky.app/profile/jasonkpargin.bsky.social/post/3mo56zob46k2k

item.title: I HATE Ai.
item.description: Artist - DranoinmyBraino. I almost considering blocking people accusing me of using it. They see something decent and they be like "no way he made this. It must be generated". I fucking hate those art stealing apps. Reasons! - The global art theft of course. - The destructive impact the Ai centers has on the environment. - The massive consumption of water that cannot be recycled. - The obscene amount of energy they use. - Hogging all the hardware, pushing prices up to a silly level. - And the fucking spamming from bed wetting cunts who flood sites with their Ai vomit. And I can't really get mad at the accusers. I get it. I really do. This is what Ai has done to the creative scene. People are not sure what they are seeing is the work of an artist and not the product of a prompt monkey. Why I always list the tools I use. But in stead of accusing me, just ask. It's that simple. I've been an artist for 17 years. I know what I am doing. This was I think ground zero for the bullshit and it got worse from there. The cunts over at that art sub would not admit they fucked up. It should have died after that. Imagine how he felt. https://www.buzzfeednews.com/article/chrisstokelwalker/art-subreddit-illustrator-ai-art-controversy Had to vent. Sorry.
item.dc:creator: Rastifan

item.title: GovBrief Today #498
item.description: Friday night, Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei switched off Fable 5, the most powerful AI his company had ever released. Its performance had crushed every rival when it launched days earlier. He pulled it because the Commerce Department invoked national security and barred every non-American from it, down to the noncitizens inside Anthropic who built it. Amodei has pressed Washington for months to hold this power over the whole industry. But taking the model offline does not erase what it can already do. The fight now is over who controls that capability. We are entering a two-tier world where governments and the largest institutions get the state of the art, and the rest of us get whatever is left. I've emailed 7,801 stories over 498 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260612-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june12 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/openai-ags [3] https://go.govbrief.today/mifepristone-contam [4] https://go.govbrief.today/fable-halted [5] https://go.govbrief.today/tda-attack [6] https://go.govbrief.today/ufc-allowed [7] https://go.govbrief.today/uf-gop [8] https://go.govbrief.today/fund-blocked [9] https://go.govbrief.today/kc-name [10] https://go.govbrief.today/natl-opera [11] https://go.govbrief.today/alabama-injection [12] https://go.govbrief.today/asylum-processing-resumes [13] https://go.govbrief.today/new-uaps [14] https://go.govbrief.today/skydance-wbd [15] https://go.govbrief.today/nps-displays Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
